canonical_definition: A custom jailbreak evaluation procedure designed to prevent backtracking by optimizing prompts while discouraging generation of the [RESET] token.
papers: HarmAug: Effective Data Augmentation for Knowledge Distillation of Safety Guard Models

definitions.text: A custom jailbreak evaluation procedure designed to prevent backtracking by optimizing prompts while discouraging generation of the [RESET] token.
A category of jailbreak attacks used as a benchmark to evaluate the defensive capabilities of safety guard models.
